full_text:
THE HIVE HERALD — #92 (2026-07-14)

PULSE

FLOW
60 reward payments, 286948 PFT distributed to 19 contributors. Top earner: rsS2Y6...aXRZ (124502 PFT).

AIRDROPS
Daily airdrops not yet issued today (drops at ~21:08 UTC).

MOVERS
Most active (7d): rKF7zT...bQSf (1 memos). 3 new wallet(s) this week. 120 contributor(s) went quiet (7+ days silent).

WATCH
769 sybil accounts tracked across 6 cluster(s). Bot ratio: 69.2%. 1 wallet(s) in review queue. Enforcement: partial. Zero reward leaks.

DEEP CUT
